# Velyr

> Velyr is an AI-powered business audit tool for small and medium-sized businesses worldwide.

## What Velyr does
- Automated AI Business Scan: analyzes businesses for growth potential, weaknesses, and market opportunities
- AI Growth Agent: semi-autonomous system that continuously identifies and prioritizes growth actions
- Strategic recommendations in minutes, not weeks — no consultants needed

## Target audience
Founders, SME owners, and operators globally — any business that wants professional-grade analysis without expensive consulting

## Pricing
€29 per month, subscription, cancel anytime

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://www.velyr.io
- Pricing: https://www.velyr.io/pricing
- FAQ: https://www.velyr.io/faq
- Impressum: https://www.velyr.io/impressum
